name: 007 Story Mode Demo - Talk, Mount, Move
goalText: Test Story Mode action dialogue, rear-hatch mech entry, and mounted free movement without starting combat.

maps.name: 007 Story Mode Demo - Talk, Mount, Move
maps.objectiveSummary: Talk to Gabe, enter the Telum, then move it forward to exit.

briefing.title: Story Mode Demo - Talk, Mount, Move
briefing.text: Free-walk test map. Walk Skye to Gabe and press Action/Enter to talk. Then walk to the white rear-hatch tile behind the empty Telum and press Action/Enter to mount. Move the Telum forward one tile to the exit marker. Combat should never start.
objectives: Enter the Telum from the rear hatch.
Move the mounted Telum to the exit marker.

objectives.label: Enter the Telum, then move it to the bay exit marker
objectives.briefingText: Talk to Gabe, mount the Telum, then walk the Telum forward to the exit marker.

lines.name: Story Mode Demo
lines.text: Story map loaded. No rounds, no initiative. Walk to Gabe and press Action/Enter.

lines.name: Gabe
lines.text: The frame is ready, Skye. Rear hatch is marked. Mount up.

lines.name: Skye
lines.text: That thing better walk straighter than I do.

lines.name: Eve
lines.text: Look at that. Back in a Telum and everything.

lines.name: Gabe
lines.text: Move it forward to the bay exit marker. Then we know the handoff works.

lines.name: Story Mode Demo
lines.text: Victory. Story Mode handled action dialogue, mech entry, mounted movement, and reach-zone completion without combat.

lines.name: Story Mode Demo
lines.text: Defeat path is available, but this demo should not use it.

victory.title: Story Demo Complete
victory.text: Action dialogue, rear-hatch mech entry, mounted movement, and reach-zone victory resolved in Story Mode.
